reviews.review_description:
The content in this app is awful. Almost all 'content' are random streamers that have video quality that is basically the equivalent of the lowest stream quality on YouTube.

There are no movies,  or shows or YouTube channels that you know on this platform.

If you install this app,  you cannot remove it from your apps. You can uninstall it,  but the icon cannot be removed.

Do not install this terrible app. I wish I hadn't and now I'm stuck with it (even if it's just a stupid icon)
